name: Coconut Chicken Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the chicken stock in a large pot.
2. Add galangal, chili, whipping cream, and coconut milk to the hot stock.
3. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces.
4. As soon as the mixture begins to boil, add the chicken pieces and squeeze in the lemon or lime juice and salt to taste.
5. Cook until the chicken is tender, about half a minute.
6. Serve 6 servings.
NOTE: The amount of coconut milk used is one can, which is roughly equivalent to 1 cup. This was determined based on personal preference during the initial preparation.
